episode.title: MTGFastFinance Ep 436: Bloomburrow EDH Staples + Monty Python Secret Lair
episode.description: Cliff and James get you caught up on all the latest in MTGFinance news, fast movers, cards to watch and hand off their review of Bloomburrow for EDH, along with notes on the Secret Lair drops this month, including Monty Python.
